== Notes for [[Item:Q113036|Q113036]] ==

Rey de León (958-960)

Condes (955)

Condes (955)

Titular king of Leon
Died in battle or was assassinated, the controversy ensues until documents are found.
Founded the Monastary of Santa Maria of Lievana

Rey de León (958-960)

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
